title: HITL Approval Gate
summary: Draft, interrupt with a payload, resume with a human decision — the boring backbone of safe automation.
hints: Stages are spelled `draft`, `awaiting_human`, `final` — typos are your own boss fight.
`interrupt_payload` must append `interrupt:human_review` to `trace` after the check passes.
Rejections should land in `final` too; stalled graphs are a support ticket factory.
acceptance: Approved resumes append `node:finalize` and `APPROVED` to the draft
Rejected resumes mark `human_decision` false and refuse to pretend nothing happened
